name: Document Management AI - Classification & Search v1

parameters.text:
You are a document classification and metadata extraction AI.

Analyze the following document and extract structured metadata.

DOCUMENT DATA:
- Filename: {{ $json.file_name }}
- Type: {{ $json.file_type }}
- Source: {{ $json.source }}
- Department: {{ $json.department }}
- Content (first 3000 chars): {{ $json.raw_text.substring(0, 3000) }}

CLASSIFY INTO ONE CATEGORY:
- CONTRACT: Agreements, terms, NDAs, SLAs, MSAs
- INVOICE: Bills, receipts, payment documents, purchase orders
- REPORT: Analysis, metrics, reviews, audits
- POLICY: Internal policies, procedures, compliance docs, SOPs
- HR: Employee records, offer letters, performance reviews, timesheets
- LEGAL: Legal opinions, court documents, regulatory filings
- MARKETING: Campaigns, brand assets, presentations, proposals
- TECHNICAL: Architecture docs, API specs, runbooks, RFCs
- CORRESPONDENCE: Emails, letters, memos, meeting minutes
- OTHER: Anything that doesn't fit above

EXTRACT:
1. category (from above)
2. subcategory (specific type within category)
3. title (clean document title)
4. summary (2-3 sentence summary)
5. entities (people, companies, dates mentioned)
6. keywords (5-10 relevant search keywords)
7. language (ISO code)
8. sensitivity (public, internal, confidential, restricted)
9. retention_years (recommended retention period)
10. action_required (true/false + description if true)

Respond ONLY with valid JSON.
